card.title: Anomaly detection
card.description: Statistical scan over the last 30 days that flags voids, refunds, no-sale opens, and ticket spikes outside the team's normal pattern.

states.error: Could not load anomalies. Try again in a moment.
states.disabled: Anomaly detection is off. Enable it in Company → AI settings to scan for anomalies.
states.empty: No anomalies detected in the last 30 days. Team is operating within the normal pattern.
states.summary_one: {{count}} alert detected in the last 30 days
states.summary_other: {{count}} alerts detected in the last 30 days

modal.title: Detected anomalies
modal.description: Each row is a statistical outlier compared to the rest of the team or to the cashier's own 30-day baseline. Use this as a starting point for an investigation, not a definitive accusation.
